items.name: af-tokens
items.title: AF Brand Tokens
items.description: Canonical AF CSS tokens — Ink, Paper, Pulse + semantic glow/surface/border derivatives. Source: ~/.claude/skills/af-design-catalog/palettes/ink-paper-pulse.md

items.name: afvq-card-unified
items.title: AFVQ Card (Unified)
items.description: AF testimonial card — single unified frame containing left-aligned text + right-aligned video, AFVQ pulse-blue underglow tying both halves into one designed moment. Alternating left/right per row supported via the variant prop. Per af-brand-doctrine § 6.
